details: Tertiary expansion of evaporation pond infrastructure. Lower confidence reflects partial cloud contamination in the optical mosaic; SAR backscatter partially corroborates.

economic_intelligence.what: BSI above baseline; partial NDWI signal detected on southern salar edge.
economic_intelligence.where: Southern terminus of Salar de Atacama, near Toconao community.
economic_intelligence.when: Detected 2024-10-12; onset unclear due to partial cloud cover obstruction in August–September.
economic_intelligence.how_unusual: Z-score 2.97 — statistically significant (> 2.5σ threshold) but lower certainty due to cloud contamination.
economic_intelligence.economic_signal: Consistent with Albemarle Corporation Phase 3 brine extraction permit approved 2023.
economic_intelligence.cross_reference: Albemarle 2024 Annual Report — Chile operations section.
economic_intelligence.alternative_explanation: Possible topographic shadow near Andes piedmont; BSI could be elevated by volcanic rock outcrops rather than industrial salt crust.
